# General Anthroposophical Society

## Membership as Support of the School of Spiritual Science

The Anthroposophical Society is a cosmopolitan initiative with 36 national societies and roughly 42,000 members. It has its seat at the Goetheanum. The members enable and support the Goetheanum, which sees itself as a School of spiritual science, a house for the arts and a meeting place for the worldwide anthroposophical movement.

[More on the Society (PDF)](https://static.goetheanum.ch/assets/archiv/EN_Becoming-a-member_2025.pdf)

## The Society Worldwide

![](https://static.goetheanum.ch/uploads/websites/Hauptseite/Seiten/gesellschaft-neu/_1500xAUTO_crop_center-center_85_none/SP_Cover_IMG_6521_G50_3456x5184-1000-x-1000-WEB_191004_190700.jpg)

Today the General Anthroposophical Society connects many hundreds of groups, branches, and regional societies. The spectrum ranges from open discussion meetings to general issues of current events to specialised thematic working groups, from strictly spiritual science study groups to informal reading groups, to people from all areas of life and work who are committed to civil society.

The

![School](https://static.goetheanum.ch/assets/medias/_90x60_crop_center-center_20_none/629516/15.jpg)

# School of Spiritual Science

## Goetheanum – School of Spiritual Science

![](https://static.goetheanum.ch/assets/medias/_1500xAUTO_crop_center-center_85_none/1785275/Goetheanum-Drone_XueLi7.jpg_compressed.jpeg)

The [School of Spiritual Science](https://goetheanum.ch/en/school) with its twelve sections is active worldwide in research, development, teaching, and the practical implementation of its research findings and is supported by the [Anthroposophical Society.](https://goetheanum.ch/en/society) Events range from lectures on special themes, to large, international conferences, to performances by ensembles and guest performances in Eurythmy, theater, puppetry and music.

Situated in the Jura landscape, 10 Kilometers South of Basel, the Goetheanum sits grand on the Dornach hill, with its expressive architecture and picturesque [garden park](https://gartenpark.goetheanum.org/), café and a [bookstore](http://www.goetheanum-buchhandlung.ch/).

## Goetheanum Leadership

# ABOUT GMCA

We are a family-oriented Community Association and swim club in a historic Eichler neighborhood located in south Palo Alto, CA. As a member at Greenmeadow, you’ll get more than access to our beautiful pool, new clubhouse and aquatics programs. Membership includes becoming a part of our broader community with picnics, seasonal parties, discounted facility rental, active online discussion groups and more.

![pic-2](https://greenmeadow.org/wp-content/uploads/2017/06/pic-2.jpg)

## **Swim and Fitness**

Join us for year-round lap and recreational swim in our heated pool, swim lessons, swim team and yoga

[LEARN MORE](https://greenmeadow.org/swim-fitness/)

![Families relaxing at Greenmeadow Pool](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

## **Membership**

Anyone may join! Residents of the Greenmeadow neighborhood AND families or individuals living outside Greenmeadow may join GMCA

[JOIN NOW](https://greenmeadow.org/join/)

![Greenmeadow Band 4th of July celebration](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

More than a pool and clubhouse! Picnics, progressive dinner

Welcome to Sunbridge Institute, an independent, not-for-profit adult learning community. North America’s oldest Waldorf teacher education institute, Sunbridge presents low-residency, world-renowned **[Waldorf teacher education programs](https://www.sunbridge.edu/teacher-education/program-overview/)**, as well as professional development and general interest **[courses and workshops](https://www.sunbridge.edu/courses-workshops/workshops-events/)** on Waldorf education and teaching, organizational leadership, and the arts. ## Who We Are

Settled on 80 acres of farm and forest, 30 miles north of New York City, the Fellowship Community serves the needs of elder members through the phases of aging, from independent apartment living to more direct care, surrounding and supporting the individual with a more human approach to care.

[Find Out More](https://www.fellowshipcommunity.org/about-us)

![Lindsey and Nancy](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/be2868_a8f307d7110e4e2e9b3e791748ecd8e9~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_0,y_64,w_1500,h_1036/fill/w_519,h_358,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Lindsey%20and%20Nancy.jpg)

The Fellowship Community has received a Best of Senior Living Award from A Place for Mom, a senior care referral service that provides assistance to families in search of elder care options. The Fellowship is considered one of the highest rated senior living communities.

# Camphill Village Copake

 [Skip to main content](https://camphillvillage.org/#content)
 Launch static backdrop modal


![](https://camphillvillage.org/wp-content/smush-avif/DSC_0763-1-1620x1080.jpg.avif)

## A productive and welcoming community where people of all abilities thrive together.

[Read More](https://camphillvillage.org/about-us/)

![](https://camphillvillage.org/wp-content/themes/elevationweb/assets/images/cvc-divider-home-white-top.png)

## A lifetime of integration, equity, and opportunity

Camphill Village Copake is a diverse community shared by people with developmental differences, where opportunities for personal fulfillment abound.

A luminary in our field, the founding of Camphill Village in 1961 was part of a transformative movement in the United States to reform how society treats people with special needs.

name: Demeter USA
crawl_description: Demeter USA certifies Biodynamic® farms and products in the United States. Biodynamic is the highest standard in organic & regenerative farming.
crawl_title: Demeter USA | Certified Biodynamic® Farms & Products
markdown_excerpt:
[Skip to content](https://demeter-usa.org/#content "Skip to content")

![Apricot Lane Farm](http://demeter-usa.org/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/demeter-apricot-lane-farm-web.webp)

![](https://demeter-usa.org/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/biodynamic-headline.png)

Photo by: Yvette Roman. Apricot Lane Farms, Moorpark, CA.

# Biodynamic® Is the Gold Standard

Biodynamic agriculture is an ecological, holistic, and regenerative approach to farming, food, and nutrition. It is founded on a deep respect for nature, and a recognition that everything in our world, above and below, is beautifully interconnected — soil, water, plants, animals, people, and the cosmos.

Biodynamic strives to replicate the wisdom of nature by creating a harmonic living system in which fertility is self-generated, pests are subdued through a natural balance, and water is captured efficiently. Biodynamic is the most generative form of agriculture; in the ideal Biodynamic farm, farmers _return_ life to the land, more than they harvest.

Biodynamic farmers read the land’s inherent tendencies, nurture native species, and honor the influence of celestial and subtle energies to hone in vitality to the land. They integrate animals thoughtfully and humanely, and they rely on cover crops, crop rotations, composting, and holistic and homeopathic remedies to heal the soil microbiome.

[**Learn More**](https://demeter-usa.org/biodynamic-principles-and-practices/)

![Johan Vineyards](http://demeter-usa.org/wp-content/uploads

name: Rudolf Steiner Archive
crawl_description: The largest digital library of the works of Austrian philosopher and founder of Anthroposophy, Rudolf Steiner, translated into English
crawl_title: Rudolf Steiner Archive
markdown_excerpt:
[DONATE](https://shop.rsarchive.org/community/give/2026)

![SOL Collage including The Resurrection of Christ by Liane Collot d'Herbois](https://rsarchive.org/blog/images/EasterJoy.png)

## Holy Week & Easter

March 29, 2026

As Easter approaches, people in the Northern Hemisphere look forward to leaving behind the darkness of winter and moving forward to the expanding light of spring. During the fall and winter, we witnessed the earth wither and withdraw into itself. We too entered a period of isolation like retreating into a spiritual wilderness. Now, as spring approaches and sunlight grows, we experience a shift in our souls as the earth exhales in a sigh of awakening.

Every Easter, Rudolf Steiner's anthroposophical _Soul Calendar_ begins anew. Its 52 verses offer powerful riddles to awaken the soul to an experience of the Divine. It is no less than _formulae_ for the proper evolution of humanity through the course of the year.1Rudolf Steiner, [_Calendar of the Soul_,](https://rsarchive.org/Lectures/GA143/English/Singles/19120507p01.html) GA 143, 7 May 1912, Cologne.

The last verse of the calendar, is to be practiced during Holy Week. Our translation of Verse 52 is outlined below in seven lines to both resound the biblical events of the spiritual Mystery _and_ reflect the seven cosmic forces at work each day of the week.2[_The Calendar of the Soul_](https://rsarchive.org/Articles/GA040/English/SOL2025/COTS_SOL.html), GA 40, Translated by Steiner Online Library, with comme

The mission of the Waldorf Early Childhood Association of North America is to foster a new cultural impulse for the work with the young child from pre-birth to age seven.

WECAN is committed to nurturing childhood as a foundation for renewing human culture.

[LEARN MORE](https://waldorfearlychildhood.org/about-wecan/our-mission-and-vision/)

[Attached is the celebratory 100-year packet](https://files.constantcontact.com/a44aea7c001/4a60e7dd-9b34-4e27-baf3-28d9ba4d2191.pdf) featuring our butterfly theme, which we hope you find enlivening and meaningful in your classrooms, schools, and communities. This packet and the butterfly represent our deepest wish that you will help embrace our movement through study, circles, and stories in the classroom, and be inspired to visit with one another, pollinating or spreading small acts of connection, sharing the fruits of our love and labour, and uplifting us all.

## Welcome to Emerson College

Emerson College is a centre for transformative learning, creativity and health, set within 22 acres of biodynamic gardens and woodlands in the heart of the Ashdown Forest. Now part of the Ruskin Mill Land Trust, we are renewing our mission through the Genius Loci – the spirit of place – and the four guiding pillars of Health, Education, Arts and Land.

[Discover our story](https://emerson.org.uk/about-us/)

### **WELCOME TO RUDOLF STEINER HOUSE**

Rudolf Steiner House is the only example of expressionist (organic) architecture in London.

Here you can take part in a variety of events and activities inspired by Rudolf Steiner’s philosophy, known as anthroposophy (wisdom of being human).

The House is home to a distinctive bookshop, an ambient cafe with biodynamic coffee and the multi award-winning Marylebone Theatre.

Whatever may bring you here, you are most welcome.

**Easter Opening Times**

**Café**

The Café will close at 4pm on Thursday 2 April and will reopen at 10am on Tuesday 7 April.

**Bar**

The Bar will be open 75 minutes before each performance and during intervals throughout the Easter period:

- Friday: 6.15pm

- Saturday: 1.15pm and 6.15pm

- Sunday: 1.45pm
